typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Dim_Query as string (),
	var_Dw_Run_Cncl_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Key as integer (),
	var_Dw_Run_Month as integer (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_MaxSk as integer (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string ()
}

source(output(
		MajorTasksID as integer,
		MajorTask as string,
		MajorTaskStatus as string,
		MajorTaskStartDate as timestamp,
		MajorTaskDueDate as timestamp,
		MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask as string,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryType as string,
		MajorTaskEstimatedHours as double,
		MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour as double,
		MajorTaskComments as string,
		MajorTaskComplexity as string,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		ProjectID as integer,
		DeliverableID as integer,
		TaskCategoryTypeID as integer,
		CategoryID as integer,
		SubCategoryID as integer,
		Modified as timestamp,
		LKP_Modified as timestamp,
		dw_Run_Key as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT [MajorTasksID] ,[MajorTask],[MajorTaskStatus],[MajorTaskStartDate],[MajorTaskDueDate]      ,[MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask]      ,[MajorTaskTaskCategoryType]      ,[MajorTaskEstimatedHours]      ,[MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour]      ,[MajorTaskComments]      ,[MajorTaskComplexity]      ,[dw_Run_Key]      ,[DW_Upsert_Flag]      ,[ProjectID]      ,[DeliverableID]      ,[TaskCategoryTypeID]      ,[CategoryID]      ,[SubCategoryID]      ,[Modified]	  ,[Modified] AS LKP_Modified FROM SRC.STG_MAJORTASKS WHERE dw_Run_Key = 415',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCLoadMajorTask	source(output(
		MajorTaskSK as integer,
		MajorTasksID as integer,
		MajorTask as string,
		MajorTaskStatus as string,
		MajorTaskStartDate as timestamp,
		MajorTaskDueDate as timestamp,
		MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask as string,
		MajorTaskEstimatedHours as double,
		MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour as double,
		MajorTaskComments as string,
		MajorTaskComplexity as string,
		MajorTaskProjectSK as integer,
		MajorTaskDeliverableSk as integer,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		DW_Create_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Update_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Update_Run_key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp,
		DW_EstimatedHoursChange_Flag as string,
		MajTaskChangedEstHours as string,
		ProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  *, (SELECT PROJECTID FROM dw.D_Projects WHERE ProjectSK = dw.D_MajorTasks.MajorTaskProjectSK) ProjectID FROM    dw.D_MajorTasks WHERE	(DW_Current_Flag = 1)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPINWareHouseLKPTABLE	source(output(
		TaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TaskCategoryTypeID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        TaskCategoryTypeSK, TaskCategoryTypeID FROM            dw.D_TaskCategoryType  WHERE DW_Current_Flag = 1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKLKPTABLE	source(output(
		DeliverableSK as integer,
		DeliverablesID as integer,
		DProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        DeliverableSK, DeliverablesID, (select ProjectID from dw.D_Projects where ProjectSK=DeliverableProjectSk) as DProjectID FROM            dw.D_Deliverables WHERE DW_Current_Flag = 1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectSK as integer,
		ProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  ProjectSK, ProjectID FROM   dw.D_Projects  WHERE DW_Current_Flag = 1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPMajorTaskProjectSKLKPTABLE
OLESRCLoadMajorTask,LKPMajorTaskProjectSKLKPTABLE lookup(OLESRCLoadMajorTask@ProjectID == LKPMajorTaskProjectSKLKPTABLE@ProjectID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPMajorTaskProjectSK
LKPMajorTaskProjectSK select(mapColumn(
		MajorTasksID = MajorTasksID,
		MajorTask = MajorTask,
		MajorTaskStatus = MajorTaskStatus,
		MajorTaskStartDate = MajorTaskStartDate,
		MajorTaskDueDate = MajorTaskDueDate,
		MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask = MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryType = MajorTaskTaskCategoryType,
		MajorTaskEstimatedHours = MajorTaskEstimatedHours,
		MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour = MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour,
		MajorTaskComments = MajorTaskComments,
		MajorTaskComplexity = MajorTaskComplexity,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectID = OLESRCLoadMajorTask@ProjectID,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID,
		TaskCategoryTypeID = TaskCategoryTypeID,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubCategoryID = SubCategoryID,
		Modified = Modified,
		LKP_Modified = LKP_Modified,
		dw_Run_Key = dw_Run_Key,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPMajorTaskProjectSKSelect
LKPMajorTaskProjectSKSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPMajorTaskProjectSKIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPMajorTaskProjectSKIsMatch@Match,LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKLKPTABLE lookup(LKPMajorTaskProjectSKIsMatch@Match@TaskCategoryTypeID == LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKLKPTABLE@TaskCategoryTypeID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSK
LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSK select(mapColumn(
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		MajorTasksID = MajorTasksID,
		MajorTask = MajorTask,
		MajorTaskStatus = MajorTaskStatus,
		MajorTaskStartDate = MajorTaskStartDate,
		MajorTaskDueDate = MajorTaskDueDate,
		MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask = MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryType = MajorTaskTaskCategoryType,
		MajorTaskEstimatedHours = MajorTaskEstimatedHours,
		MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour = MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour,
		MajorTaskComments = MajorTaskComments,
		MajorTaskComplexity = MajorTaskComplexity,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID,
		TaskCategoryTypeID = LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKLKPTABLE@TaskCategoryTypeID,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubCategoryID = SubCategoryID,
		Modified = Modified,
		LKP_Modified = LKP_Modified,
		dw_Run_Key = dw_Run_Key,
		TaskCategoryTypeSK = TaskCategoryTypeSK
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKSelect
LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPMajorTaskCategoryTypeSKIsMatch@Match,LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKLKPTABLE lookup(ProjectID == DProjectID && DeliverableID == DeliverablesID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSK
LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSK split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match derive(DW_Effective_End_Date = toTimestamp(toString(('9999-12-31 00:00:00.000'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_Begin_Date = toTimestamp(toString(iif(DW_Run_Key < $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, $User__var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt, toString(Modified)), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_Curr_Flag = 1,
		var_Update_Run_Key = $User__var_Dw_Run_Key,
		var_Run_Key = toInteger(iif(DW_Run_Key < $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, toString(DW_Run_Key))),
		TaskCategoryTypeSK = iif(isNull(TaskCategoryTypeSK), -(3), TaskCategoryTypeSK),
		DeliverableSK = iif(isNull(DeliverableSK), -(3), DeliverableSK),
		MajorTaskComments = iif(isNull(MajorTaskComments), '', MajorTaskComments),
		ProjectSK = iif(isNull(ProjectSK), -(3), ProjectSK),
		MajorTask = iif(isNull(MajorTask), '', MajorTask)) ~> DERDEFAULTVALUES
DERDEFAULTVALUES,LKPINWareHouseLKPTABLE lookup(LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@ProjectID == LKPINWareHouseLKPTABLE@ProjectID && LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTasksID == LKPINWareHouseLKPTABLE@MajorTasksID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPINWareHouse
LKPINWareHouse select(mapColumn(
		DW_Effective_End_Date = DERDEFAULTVALUES@DW_Effective_End_Date,
		var_Begin_Date = var_Begin_Date,
		var_Curr_Flag = var_Curr_Flag,
		var_Update_Run_Key = var_Update_Run_Key,
		var_Run_Key = var_Run_Key,
		DeliverableSK = DeliverableSK,
		TaskCategoryTypeSK = TaskCategoryTypeSK,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		MajorTasksID = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTasksID,
		MajorTask = DERDEFAULTVALUES@MajorTask,
		MajorTaskStatus = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTaskStatus,
		MajorTaskStartDate = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTaskStartDate,
		MajorTaskDueDate = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTaskDueDate,
		MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryType = MajorTaskTaskCategoryType,
		MajorTaskEstimatedHours = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTaskEstimatedHours,
		MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour,
		MajorTaskComments = DERDEFAULTVALUES@MajorTaskComments,
		MajorTaskComplexity = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@MajorTaskComplexity,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectID = LKPMajorTaskDeliverableSKIsMatch@Match@ProjectID,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID,
		TaskCategoryTypeID = TaskCategoryTypeID,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubCategoryID = SubCategoryID,
		Modified = Modified,
		LKP_Modified = LKP_Modified,
		dw_Run_Key = DERDEFAULTVALUES@dw_Run_Key,
		DW_Run_Key = DERDEFAULTVALUES@DW_Run_Key,
		{} = {},
		MajorTaskSK = MajorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskProjectSK = MajorTaskProjectSK,
		MajorTaskDeliverableSk = MajorTaskDeliverableSk,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DW_Create_Datetime = DW_Create_Datetime,
		DW_Update_Datetime = DW_Update_Datetime,
		DW_Update_Run_key = DW_Update_Run_key,
		DW_Current_Flag = DW_Current_Flag,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = DW_Effective_Begin_Date,
		DW_EstimatedHoursChange_Flag = DW_EstimatedHoursChange_Flag,
		MajTaskChangedEstHours = MajTaskChangedEstHours
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPINWareHouseSelect
LKPINWareHouseSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPINWareHouseIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPINWareHouseIsMatch@Match split(((trim(MajorTask) != trim(MajorTask)) || (trim(MajorTaskStatus) != trim(MajorTaskStatus)) || (MajorTaskStartDate != MajorTaskStartDate) || (MajorTaskDueDate != MajorTaskDueDate) || (trim(MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask) != trim(MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask)) || (MajorTaskEstimatedHours != MajorTaskEstimatedHours) || (MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour != MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour) || (trim(MajorTaskComments) != trim(MajorTaskComments)) || (trim(MajorTaskComplexity) != trim(MajorTaskComplexity)) || (ProjectSK != MajorTaskProjectSK) || (DeliverableSK != MajorTaskDeliverableSk) || (TaskCategoryTypeSK != MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK)), disjoint: true) ~> CSPLPullModifiedMajorTasks@(ModifiedMajorTasks,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
CSPLPullModifiedMajorTasks@CSPLPullModifiedMajorTasksTOCSPLPullModifiedMajorTasksREFORMATDATATYPEDIFFLINK derive({} = toDouble({})) ~> CSPLPullModifiedMajorTasksREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF
CSPLPullModifiedMajorTasksREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF,LKPINWareHouseIsMatch@NotMatch union(byName: true) ~> ALLCombineInsertandUpdateInserts
CSPLPullModifiedMajorTasks@ModifiedMajorTasks sink(input(
		{} as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CMDSetInactive
ALLCombineInsertandUpdateInserts sink(input(
		MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour as double,
		MajorTaskComments as string,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		MajorTaskDeliverableSk as integer,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		MajorTask as string,
		MajorTaskComplexity as string,
		MajorTaskEstimatedHours as double,
		MajorTaskProjectSK as integer,
		MajorTaskStatus as string,
		MajorTaskStartDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		MajorTaskDueDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		MajorTasksID as integer,
		DW_Update_Run_key as integer,
		MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask as string,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		MajorTaskExpectedTimeHour,
		MajorTaskComments,
		DW_Effective_End_Date,
		DW_Upsert_Flag,
		MajorTaskDeliverableSk = DeliverableSK,
		DW_Run_Key = var_Run_Key,
		MajorTask,
		MajorTaskComplexity,
		MajorTaskEstimatedHours,
		MajorTaskProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		MajorTaskStatus,
		MajorTaskStartDate,
		DW_Current_Flag = var_Curr_Flag,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = TaskCategoryTypeSK,
		MajorTaskDueDate,
		MajorTasksID,
		DW_Update_Run_key = var_Update_Run_Key,
		MajorTaskIsCrMajorTask,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = var_Begin_Date)) ~> OLEInsertMajorTask
